testcase.name: test_admin_login_success

failure.message: AssertionError: Token not in response assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbiIsImV4cCI6MTc3MjEyMzMzMX0.G0510iErtaEiqy5IYNhrXAi9hU9SPpqD9N5DFf_X4Ks', 'token_type': 'bearer'}

testcase.failure: tests/test_cms_seo_metadata.py:27: in test_admin_login_success assert "token" in data, "Token not in response" E AssertionError: Token not in response E assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbiIsImV4cCI6MTc3MjEyMzMzMX0.G0510iErtaEiqy5IYNhrXAi9hU9SPpqD9N5DFf_X4Ks', 'token_type': 'bearer'}

testcase.name: test_cms_section_has_cache_control

failure.message: AssertionError: Cache-Control should have caching directives: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate assert ('max-age' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' or 'public' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate')

testcase.failure: tests/test_cms_seo_metadata.py:279: in test_cms_section_has_cache_control assert "max-age" in cache_control or "public" in cache_control, \ E AssertionError: Cache-Control should have caching directives: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate E assert ('max-age' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' or 'public' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate')
